title: Blue Cherry Blossoms GUI
description: A cherry overhaul for your minecraft ui
body:
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f9834e82ffbb63dd8527bce721ba4927585ce15.png)

 ### **NOT FINISHED AT ALL JUST GETTING STARTED**

Make your Minecraft look really nice with a blue cherry blossom theme.

This pack changes the menus and inventory screens to have blue cherry blossom pictures but it still looks simple and easy to read just like the original Minecraft cherry blossom interface.

**I am still updating this pack and it's not to its final state. So there might be bugs or issues.**
